zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Valognes於1178年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire福爾法爾時，他的父親Sir Philip de Valognes - Lord of Ringwood, Benvie and Panmure, Chamberlain of Scotland28歲，母親Sybil of Torpenhow35歲。他與Loretta de Quincy結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年6月21日在蘇格蘭洛包爾凱爾索享年41歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Valognes于1178年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire福爾法爾时，他的父亲Sir Philip de Valognes - Lord of Ringwood, Benvie and Panmure, Chamberlain of Scotland28岁，母亲Sybil of Torpenhow35岁。他与Loretta de Quincy结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年6月21日在苏格兰洛包爾凱爾索享年41岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Valognes was born in 1178, in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Philip de Valognes - Lord of Ringwood, Benvie and Panmure, Chamberlain of Scotland, was 28 and his mother, Sybil of Torpenhow, was 35. He married Loretta de Quincy. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 21 June 1219, in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 41, and was buried in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Loretta de Quincy. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juin 1219, à Kelso, Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Valognesが1178年にスコットランドForfarshireフォーファルで生まれた時，父Sir Philip de Valognes - Lord of Ringwood, Benvie and Panmure, Chamberlain of Scotlandは28歳，母Sybil of Torpenhowは35歳であった。Loretta de Quincyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年6月21日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアケルソで41歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースメルローゼメルローゼ アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: William de Valognes(이)가 1178년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 포파르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Philip de Valognes - Lord of Ringwood, Benvie and Panmure, Chamberlain of Scotland(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil of Torpenhow(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Loretta de Quincy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 6월 21일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 켈소에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Valognes родился в 1178 г. в местности форфар, Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Philip de Valognes - Lord of Ringwood, Benvie and Panmure, Chamberlain of Scotland было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil of Torpenhow, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Loretta de Quincy. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 21 июня 1219 г. в местности келсо, роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
